title: Shield AI raises $2 billion, valuing the military drone maker at $12.7 billion
description: Shield AI raised $2 billion, pushing its valuation to $12.7 billion-more than double from a year ago. The San Diego firm makes autonomous military drones and software used by several governments, including Ukraine.

title: Unbelievable! 84-Year-Old Grandmother Falls In Love With AI Generated Human
description: Zhang Yulan, from central China's Hubei province, also asked for an apology for 'hurting' character called Jianguo.

title: The Global Implications of China’s 5-Year Plan AI Ambitions
description: China’s quest for global leadership in AI and cybersecurity threatens free expression and information integrity around the world.

title: 'Hawak Mo ang Beat" composer denies use of AI in viral song
description: The upbeat song “Hawak Mo ang Beat” has been making waves across various social media platforms and continues to hook listeners with its catchy rhythm and feel-good vibe, inspiring countless dance videos online.

title: AI challenges mean it's time to shine for cyber professionals – but they need a helping hand
description: Keep your security pros close, you never know when you’ll need them to solve an AI-related crisis
